understanding_error.description: Task understanding failed - unclear intent or missing context
understanding_error.resolution: Clarify with user or use memory recall

routing_error.description: Skill routing selected wrong skill or no skill available
routing_error.resolution: Update skill registry or routing weights

tool_error.description: Tool execution failed - network, permission, or execution error
tool_error.resolution: Retry with different approach or report tool issue

memory_miss.description: Relevant memory not found or retrieval failed
memory_miss.resolution: Improve memory indexing or manually add experience

rule_conflict.resolution: Review rules or escalate to governance

execution_timeout.description: Task or subtask exceeded time limit
execution_timeout.resolution: Break into smaller subtasks or optimize

file_scope_error.resolution: Verify file paths or request scope expansion

incomplete_validation.resolution: Add validation checks or improve output format
